raw_consumer_statement: Im trying to dispute a double charge on something I bought XXXX. Its a charge of {$63.00} on the XXXX XXXX. Ive contacted AMEX support and they are NO help. Their chat bot just tells me to resolve it on my own essentially. I tried to dispute the double charge through the app and website and they said my dispute was incomplete and closed so I have to contact the number on the back of my card. The transaction reference numbers are XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX
